title: aorchis cyclochila
intro: Aorchis cyclochila, also known as the orchid plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. Aorchis cyclochila has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aorchis cyclochila include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and promote healthy digestion. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
